meaning: Value directly exists in source or raw package
Value derived by an explicit versioned rule
allowed_usage: Populate value with medium/low confidence and rule reference
forbidden_interpretation: Do not call official or observed

meaning: Source scope was checked but truth cannot be determined
Source does not release the field
forbidden_interpretation: Do not infer a negative value

meaning: Field has no semantic meaning for this unit/table
forbidden_interpretation: Do not count as missing data

meaning: Source states field exists but is withheld/deidentified
Field should be parseable but parser failed
allowed_usage: Leave value null and fail/warn QC
forbidden_interpretation: Do not silently coerce to unknown

meaning: Value/name is a management or benchmark recommendation
allowed_usage: Keep outside source-truth columns until approved
forbidden_interpretation: Do not present as source fact
